Patch Set 7:

Jian,

I see that change 13301 says "Cannot Merge".  It depends on 13300 (also mine) for the context to match, so I believe that is the reason for the warning, but I'm not certain how to prove it.

However, I rebased the patch to the tip of your master about 1/2 hour ago, so as long as the patches are applied in order there should be no problem.

Please me know if there is anything else I should do.

thanks,
Olaf

Patch Set 7:

Thank you, Olaf. Please do not worry about the merge conflict issue.

I'm testing the patch locally and will review it later.

parents.subject: LU-6098 tests: skip client mount in test-framework

commit.subject: LU-6098 tests: start debug_daemon before server
commit.message:
LU-6098 tests: start debug_daemon before server

Alter test-framework.sh:setupall() to start the debug_daemon
before mounting the servers, instead of waiting to start
it just before mounting the client.

This makes examining the server startup process easier.

De-duplicate the host list in do_nodes() to
eliminate the potential race condition created when
commands are run multiple times on a single host.

Remove unnecessary duplicate *mount_client* calls,
no functional change.

Signed-off-by: Olaf Faaland <faaland1@llnl.gov>
Change-Id: Ida92923807ce9c6c059376e937555fa1f840e2f3
